narrative:
Huber Heights 6-A (precinct in Montgomery County) has 894 registered voters, with 55.3% unaffiliated or lacking primary history. Republican-leaning voters make up 23.9% of registrants and Democratic-leaning voters account for 20.8%, a modest Republican lean of 3.1 percentage points.
